name: AgentMessageList
description: Chat message stream for AI agents with role-based styling.

api.name: AgentMessageList
api.description: Chat message stream for AI agents with role-based styling.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: Opt-in virtualization for long threads. When true AND Items is supplied, messages render through Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.Virtualize{TItem} so only the rows near the viewport are in the DOM. Leave false to use the simple ChildContent path (unchanged default).

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The per-message render fragments to virtualize. Each entry is rendered as one row (typically an AgentMessage). Only used when Virtualize is true; ignored otherwise.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated row height in pixels for the virtualizer (default 80).

parameters.name: OverscanCount
parameters.description: Extra rows to render above/below the viewport to smooth scrolling (default 4).

parameters.name: TimeZone
parameters.description: Time zone to render Timestamp in. When set, the timestamp is converted to this zone — pass the END USER'S zone here (in Blazor Server the component runs on the server, so the previous ToLocalTime() showed the SERVER'S zone, which is the bug #303 fixed). When null, the timestamp is rendered in the offset it already carries (a DateTimeOffset knows its own offset), so it is deterministic and server-independent.

parameters.name: TimestampFormat
parameters.description: Custom format string for the visible timestamp (default "HH:mm").

parameters.name: TimestampCulture
parameters.description: Culture used to format the timestamp (defaults to CurrentCulture).

mdSummary:
# AgentMessageList

Chat message stream for AI agents with role-based styling.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** AI
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/agent-message-list

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AgentMessageList | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageList | AutoScroll | `bool` | `true` |  |
| AgentMessageList | Virtualize | `bool` | `` | Opt-in virtualization for long threads. When true AND Items is supplied, messages render through Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.Virtualize{TItem} so only the rows near the viewport are in the DOM. Leave false to use the simple ChildContent path (unchanged default). |
| AgentMessageList | Items | `IReadOnlyList<RenderFragment>?` | `` | The per-message render fragments to virtualize. Each entry is rendered as one row (typically an AgentMessage). Only used when Virtualize is true; ignored otherwise. |
| AgentMessageList | ItemSize | `float` | `80f` | Estimated row height in pixels for the virtualizer (default 80). |
| AgentMessageList | OverscanCount | `int` | `4` | Extra rows to render above/below the viewport to smooth scrolling (default 4). |
| AgentMessageList | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Role | `AgentMessageRole` | `AgentMessageRole.Assistant` |  |
| AgentMessage | Avatar | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Timestamp | `DateTimeOffset?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | TimeZone | `TimeZoneInfo?` | `` | Time zone to render Timestamp in. When set, the timestamp is converted to this zone — pass the END USER'S zone here (in Blazor Server the component runs on the server, so the previous ToLocalTime() showed the SERVER'S zone, which is the bug #303 fixed). When null, the timestamp is rendered in the offset it already carries (a DateTimeOffset knows its own offset), so it is deterministic and server-independent. |
| AgentMessage | TimestampFormat | `string` | `"HH:mm"` | Custom format string for the visible timestamp (default "HH:mm"). |
| AgentMessage | TimestampCulture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Culture used to format the timestamp (defaults to CurrentCulture). |
| AgentMessage | IsStreaming | `bool` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (AgentMessageList) — RenderFragment slot
- `Avatar` (AgentMessage) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AgentMessage) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `AgentMessage`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<AgentMessageList />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/AgentMessageList/AgentMessage.razor`
- `UI/AgentMessageList/AgentMessageList.razor`
